Our Work

Projects, platforms, and ventures designed to transform markets and unlock sustainable growth.

Three Modalities

How We Create Impact

We deliver results through large-scale programs, scalable infrastructure, and market-creating ventures.

Projects

Large-Scale Programs

We design and deliver multi-year programs in partnership with governments and development institutions. These initiatives address systemic constraints, build capacity, and create enabling conditions for inclusive growth.

Multi-stakeholder coordination and implementation
Policy reform and institutional strengthening
Value chain development and market systems building
Measurable outcomes and impact evaluation
Platforms

Scalable Systems & Infrastructure

We build digital and physical infrastructure that enables markets and transactions. These platforms reduce friction, improve transparency, and create new opportunities for trade, data exchange, and service delivery.

Digital marketplaces and trade platforms
Data infrastructure and information systems
Payment and financial infrastructure
Quality assurance and certification systems
Ventures

High-Potential Businesses

We originate, incubate, and scale businesses that address critical market gaps. These ventures are designed to be commercially viable while delivering development outcomes—creating jobs, expanding access, and demonstrating new business models.

Idea origination and business model design
Incubation support and operational setup
Capital raising and financial structuring
Growth strategy and scale-up execution
Integrated Impact

Complementary Modalities

Our work across projects, platforms, and ventures creates reinforcing effects. Programs build enabling environments, platforms provide infrastructure, and ventures demonstrate commercial viability. Together, they create sustainable market systems that outlast individual interventions.

Case Examples

Representative Work

Due to confidentiality, we share high-level examples that illustrate our approach and impact across sectors.

Agriculture Project

Value Chain Development Program

Multi-year initiative strengthening farmer organizations, improving post-harvest handling, and building market linkages across coffee, spices, and horticulture sectors.

Digital Platform

Agricultural Trade Platform

Digital marketplace connecting farmers, cooperatives, and buyers—providing price discovery, logistics coordination, and quality assurance services.

Energy Venture

Distributed Solar Solutions

Enterprise providing productive-use solar systems to farmers and rural businesses—enabling irrigation, processing, and income-generating activities.

Trade Project

Export Facilitation Program

Initiative building export capacity for smallholder farmers—addressing quality standards, certification, logistics, and international market access.

Fintech Platform

Agri-Finance System

Digital platform enabling financial institutions to provide tailored agricultural finance products with improved risk assessment and portfolio management.

Agritech Venture

Agricultural Waste Processing

Technology-enabled venture converting agricultural residues into high-value compost—supporting circular economy and soil health improvement.

Build Solutions That Scale

Partner with SPX to design and deliver programs, platforms, or ventures that transform markets and unlock sustainable growth.

Get in TouchOur Capabilities
SPX

A strategy-to-implementation platform designing, building, and scaling market-shaping systems across emerging markets.
